data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. src/app.rs:827 and src/app.rs:859 still return directly after the state transition/update path; there is no post-terminal hook to evaluate or reconcile parent knots, so kno next and kno update do not satisfy the requested behavior. 2. src/state_hierarchy.rs:104 only exposes the global doctor-oriented find_terminal_parent_resolutions scan; there is no ancestor-scoped resolver matching the requested upward evaluation from a changed child. 3. src/doctor_fix.rs:121 is still the only place that loops over terminal parent reconciliations, which means the behavior remains limited to doctor --fix instead of any state-changing command. 4. tests/ contains doctor terminal-parent coverage only; there is no CLI coverage for kno next or kno update auto-resolving parents, and the proposed tests file tests/cli_auto_resolve_terminal_parents.rs is absent.
